song.title: Be glorified (not book)
song.author: Bob Kilpatrick
song.lyrics: [V1] .C G/B Am Em In my life, Lord, .Dm7 Dm7/C Bb Gsus Be glorified, be glorified. .C G/B Am Em In my life, Lord, .Dm7 Gsus C Be glorified today. [V2] In Your church, Lord, Be glorified, be glorified. In Your church, Lord, Be glorified today. [V3] In my heart, Lord, Be glorified, be glorified. In my heart, Lord, Be glorified today. [V4] In my praise, Lord, Be glorified, be glorified. In my praise, Lord, Be glorified today.
